source_note: Verified vs E8 Markets help center (help.e8markets.com) + 2026 reviews. E8 One DEFAULT (minimum-drawdown) config: profit target 6%, daily drawdown 3% (from start-of-day balance), max drawdown 4% DYNAMIC intraday-trailing. Customizable at purchase up to 14% drawdown / 21% target. EVALUATION has NO consistency rule and NO news restriction and unlimited trading days; the 40% Best-Day rule applies to FUNDED accounts only. Dynamic drawdown locks to static once profit equals the drawdown buffer - engine uses the non-locking (conservative) trailing model. Fee ~$260 for 100K.
size_tiers_note: Only the 100K fee ($260) is verified. Other sizes ESTIMATED from typical CFD prop-firm price ratios (needs per-size verification at the firm's checkout).
needs_verification: size_tiers: only 100K fee confirmed; other sizes estimated
